turboHeroTitle: Control of Cooling and Drilling Depth
turboHeroLead:
A drill for site preparation with control of cooling,
bone temperature, and drilling depth.
turboHeroBullet1: Irrigation flow runs along the blades
turboHeroBullet2: A fixed stopper limits drilling depth
turboHeroBullet3: Reduces the risk of bone overheating
turboAdvantage1Text: Irrigation flow runs along the blades and cools the drilling zone.
turboAdvantage2Text: A fixed stopper limits drilling depth.
turboAdvantage3Text: Helps complete the preparation stage faster without overheating.
turboDetailsTitle: Temperature and depth control during drilling
turboDetailsLead:
The design directs irrigation flow along the blades,
cooling the drilling zone and reducing the risk of bone overheating.
turboVideoLead: A concise overview of cooling, the stopper, and the drilling workflow logic.
turboFinalCtaTitle: Ready to control cooling and drilling depth?
turboFinalCtaText: We will match TURBOdrill to your surgical protocol.
